---
title: "Base R"
output: 
  html_document: 
    theme: cerulean
---
    

# Methods

<details> --------------------------------------------
<summary>add</summary>

merge(x, y, by = intersect(names(x), names(y)),
      by.x = by, by.y = by, all = FALSE, all.x = all, all.y = all,
      sort = TRUE, suffixes = c(".x",".y"), no.dups = TRUE,
      incomparables = NULL, .)
[Docs](https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/base/versions/3.6.2/topics/merge)



</details>
